testcase.name: test_delete_non_owner_blocked

testcase.name: test_upload_attachment_png
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_casos_enhancements.py:291: in test_upload_attachment_png assert upload_resp.status_code == 200, f"Upload failed: {upload_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Upload failed: {"error":"Error al subir imagen","detail":"Error al subir imagen","request_id":"e2f4eafc-edd6-4f4f-a8b3-22ec85f21583"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_guard_can_comment_on_community_case
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_casos_enhancements.py:540: in test_guard_can_comment_on_community_case assert create_resp.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 429 in [200, 201] E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
